raw.message: Drop your first beat today. Edjing Mix makes mixing simple for beginners. Start your DJ journey now!

hook.summary: A surprising mashup of Mariah Carey and King Von plays over a crowd vibing.
hook.visual_action: A group of people are dancing in a dark, club-like setting with album covers for Mariah Carey and King Von displayed on screen.
hook.voiceover_transcript: I don't want a lot for Christmas, there is just one thing I need

scene_flow: Introduction of the 'Edjing mashup' concept with two contrasting album covers.
The mashup audio kicks in, blending holiday pop with aggressive drill rap.
The crowd reacts enthusiastically to the beat drop while dancing.
Interactive UI elements appear, prompting the user to select their own songs to mash up.
audience_proxy: Gen Z and Millennial music fans who enjoy viral TikTok mashups and creative audio editing.
